faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheadline: Everything you need to know about Aexy.

items.question: Is Aexy really open source?
items.answer: Yes! The core platform is 100% open source under the MIT license. You can host it yourself for free, forever.

items.question: How does the AI profiling work?
items.answer: Our AI analyzes your public (and private, if connected) GitHub activity to identify languages, frameworks, and code patterns you use most, building a dynamic skills profile.

items.question: Can I import data from Jira?
items.answer: Absolutely. We offer a one-click import for Jira projects, epics, and tickets. We also support two-way sync so your data is always fresh.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Security is our top priority. We are SOC 2 Type II certified. We process data in short-lived encrypted containers and never train our models on your proprietary code without explicit opt-in.

items.question: What are AI Agents?
items.answer: AI Agents are intelligent automation assistants that handle tasks like email responses, CRM updates, and workflow automation. They support multiple LLM providers (Claude, Gemini) and include human-in-the-loop approval for sensitive actions. Create custom agents for support, sales, scheduling, and more.

comparison.headline: Replace tool sprawl, not just one tool

items.question: Is Aexy really open source?
items.answer: Yes. The core platform is fully open source. You can audit, fork, or self-host it anytime.

items.question: Can we self-host on paid plans?
items.answer: Yes. Paid plans unlock features - not control over your data.

items.question: Is this a CRM?
items.answer: It includes CRM - but Aexy is not a sales-only CRM. It's an operating system connecting execution, people, and relationships.

items.question: What happens if we leave?
items.answer: You export everything. No lock-in. Ever.

items.question: Can I switch plans anytime?
items.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll prorate your billing.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes! Team plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

finalCta.headline: Start with open source. Grow into your Engineering OS.
finalCta.subheadline: Join thousands of engineering teams building better software with Aexy.
